message:
fix(core): use fallible try_into for source_blocks after u8-to-u16 widening

The previous commit widened source_blocks from u8 to u16 but left two
call sites using u16::from(source_blocks) which would fail to compile
if the source type ever changed. Replace with try_into() + proper
OutOfRange error handling for consistency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -399,7 +399,12 @@ impl SymbolCodec for AsupersyncCodec {
                 what: "symbol_size as u16".to_owned(),
                 value: symbol_size.to_string(),
             })?,
-            u16::from(source_blocks),
+            source_blocks
+                .try_into()
+                .map_err(|_| FrankenError::OutOfRange {
+                    what: "source_blocks".to_owned(),
+                    value: source_blocks.to_string(),
+                })?,
             u16::try_from(symbols_per_block).map_err(|_| FrankenError::OutOfRange {
                 what: "symbols_per_block as u16".to_owned(),
                 value: symbols_per_block.to_string(),

@@ -1106,7 +1106,12 @@ mod tests {
                     what: "symbol_size as u16".to_owned(),
                     value: symbol_size.to_string(),
                 })?,
-                u16::from(source_blocks),
+                source_blocks
+                    .try_into()
+                    .map_err(|_| FrankenError::OutOfRange {
+                        what: "source_blocks".to_owned(),
+                        value: source_blocks.to_string(),
+                    })?,
                 u16::try_from(symbols_per_block).map_err(|_| FrankenError::OutOfRange {
                     what: "symbols_per_block as u16".to_owned(),
                     value: symbols_per_block.to_string(),
